## 🐛 Bug Description / 问题描述
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.
请清晰简洁地描述遇到的问题或异常行为。

## ⚙️ Environment / 运行环境
- **OS / 操作系统**: [e.g. macOS 14 / Ubuntu 22.04 / Windows 11]
- **Architecture / 架构**: [e.g. Apple Silicon (ARM64) / x86_64]
- **Python Version / Python 版本**: [e.g. CPython 3.14.0a5 free-threaded (No-GIL)]
- **`pysync-nogil` Version / 库版本**: [e.g. 0.1.2]

## 🧪 Minimal Code Example to Reproduce / 最简复现代码
```python
# Paste your minimal reproduction script here / 粘贴最简复现脚本
from pysync import Channel

ch = Channel()
# ...
```

## 📜 Error Traceback & Logs / 错误日志
```text
Paste the full error log or stack trace here / 粘贴完整异常日志或堆栈
```

## 💡 Expected Behavior / 预期行为
A clear description of what you expected to happen.
请描述您预期的正确运行结果。
